name: repassify
description: Repassify Enterprise SaaS for financial reconciliation of marketplace payouts.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w workers/ingestion && npm run build -w workers/reconciliation && npm run build -w workers/export && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/core && npm run test -w apps/api
